## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential collaboration between Laravel and fwd.digital for content strategy and AI-enabled marketing automation.](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Laravel is preparing for a major product launch with GA1 on Nov 4, GA2 around Dec 5, and full release end of January](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers two main work streams: content production (\~100k words/month) and AI enablement for marketing automation](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Potential focus areas: scaling high-value touches based on user signals, leveraging Laravel's existing community/ecosystem](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Next steps involve Marcel sending over ideas/proposal and potentially demo'ing to Laravel's new marketing hires](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Topics

### Laravel Product Launch Timeline

  - [GA1 (General Availability 1) scheduled for November 4th](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)
  - [GA2 planned for around December 5th](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Full release targeted for end of January](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Already have 27,000 people signed up for the launch](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### fwd.digital's Capabilities and Approach

  - [Two main work streams: content production and AI enablement](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Content production: \~100,000 words/month at $0.10/word](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [AI enablement: Building "intelligence processing engines" for marketing automation](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Pricing: Currently at $9,000/month per work stream, considering increases](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Flexible approach to co-build solutions and find opportunities together](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Content strategy: Leveraging Laravel's existing ecosystem and community content](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1018.0)
  - [Scaling high-value touches: Using signals to programmatically drive desired actions](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1444.0)
  - [Newsletter creation: Potential for curating community content into an auto-generated weekly newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [AI-driven personalization: Examples shared of highly personalized follow-ups and prospect profiling](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Laravel's Current Situation

  - [Doing $9 million in ARR this year, with $6 million from product sales last year](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Unique model of selling upgraded versions of open-source packages](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)
  - [Looking to maintain their ethos while scaling operations](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [New marketing hires starting soon (Cynthia and Sam)](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### Technical Integrations

  - [Laravel team signing with HubSpot, exploring their Ops Hub functionality](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Discussion on various tools: Clay, Airtable, n8n for workflow automation](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Potential for building custom integrations and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to compile high-level ideas and potential collaboration areas in a document](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Trey to share any non-obvious business insights or potential opportunity areas](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [Schedule a demo/discussion with Laravel's new marketing hires (Cynthia and Sam)](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)
  - [Explore potential start date and engagement structure for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/f3LcnnEbAhSrgKeAqefb7t_xzAfby9q6?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
